subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His handmaiden from among His handmaidens who hath hearkened unto the Call and answered her Lord, the Lord of Names. Verily, We make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکر الله امه من امائه التی سمعت الندآء و اجابت ربها مالک الاسماء انا نذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
